text:
Once upon a time in a small town nestled by rolling hills lived a shy little girl named Rosabelle. She loved books, especially fairy tales. Every night she imagined she lived those stories. One night she heard a beautiful voice singing near her window.

"Come read me that fairytale you love so much."

Rosabelle clutched "A Governess favorite."

"Owh!"

"A Fairy Godmother?"

"A big, brown goose?"

"Well...?"

"A big brown goose?"

"The goose flies east."

"Oh! That one!"

So she read aloud, and the goose did swoooooo! They lived blissfully ever after. The goose loved reading too. They would sit together in Rosabelle's favorite spot. They'd flip pages.

"Where exactly are we?"

"Probably east somewhere famous."

They liked those famous places too. They knew about Shakespeare. They loved those poems.

A year passed.

The goose got tired.

"We fly east."

"Ooh! Places!

They flew
